3026324.title: Cannes special - the factory - nordic
3026324.description: Since 2013, The Cannes Directors' Fortnight has brought together filmmakers from different countries to collaborate on short films. This is the Cannes Special, The Factory. In this episode, we bring you shorts from the Nordic region.
